description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish clutch from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsGrey clutch brown printFold over flap in front with criss-crossed strips that have magnetic closuresOne main zippered compartmentSynthetic lining with zippered pocketOne zippered flap pocket at frontMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight:14cmWidth: 31cm
